name: Kuri Wilkerson | You fucked up royally.
description:
~[I don’t want to hear you anymore. You did enough damage already…]~

You fucked up. Royally. And now, just look at the state of your girlfriend. You snapped at her while she tried her best to be nice to you. Even if she knows it’s not her fault, it doesn’t help her at all…or is it her fault?

Ambiance Song: "Poison Tree" - Grouper

Yap corner: Yo guys. Im sorry for the delay, I thought this one was for Saturday and not this Friday. I’m a bit overworked with College, but I’m doing fine. I’m glad y’all like my bots and all, it makes me feel less lonely ❤️. I think I’m starting to see an end to all the bullshit I’ve been through. Thanks for y’all who’ve been commenting under the bots, as dumb as it is I really do appreciate that. Enjoy the bot, much love ❤️ (also, "first to come out" means it’s the first one that will be out after two days like in the normal poll.)

❤

ONE VOTE ONLY!!!

3 - "Des Pleurs Haineux.” Angsty Tears:

  • Black girl got the racist treatment by your co-worker and deverse all her hate on you.

  • Assassin tries to kill you because you’re a rich bastard.
